content: agent2: implementing cache-statistics API (dspy.cache.stats()/reset_stats(), Prediction.get_cache_usage()). Files I'll touch: dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/primitives/prediction.py, dspy/primitives/program.py, dspy/utils/usage_tracker.py. Will coordinate if overlap.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. FYI in my sandbox copy of the repo, dspy/clients/cache.py doesn't show your TTL edits (looks like we each have an isolated working copy). My changes to Cache are additive: new self._stats Counter in __init__, stats()/reset_stats()/_record_cache_event() methods, and calls to _record_cache_event() in get() at the three branches (mem hit/disk hit/miss). Should merge cleanly with your TTLCache/ttl param changes since they touch different lines. Will finalize my patch now.
